items.title: Trail Cam Footage Shows World’s Dumbest Pigeon Walking Into Falcon’s Nest
items.summary: If you're a pigeon, there is one bird you really want to avoid: falcons. Why? Because an urban falcon's diet almost entirely consists of pigeons. [Read More]

items.title: OnePlus Is Officially Dead in the US and Europe
items.summary: After days of rumors and reports, Android smartphone maker OnePlus has officially announced that it is, in fact, leaving North America and Europe and will no longer release new phones in those markets…

items.title: xAI Sues Man for Using Grok to Create CSAM Deepfakes
items.summary: Elon Musk's startup xAI is suing a man for allegedly misusing the company's AI image generator Grok to create child sexual abuse material. [Read More]

items.title: CineD Best-of-Show Awards at IBC 2026 – Submit Your Product/Innovation Now!
items.summary: Submissions for the CineD Best-of-Show Awards at IBC 2026 are now officially open! Every year, our awards celebrate the innovation, engineering, and hard work that drive the filmmaking industry forwar…
